ENDLESS_MODE.enter.title: Enter Endless Mode
ENDLESS_MODE.enter.description: Return to Act 1. Gain [gold]Plague Spear[/gold], [gold]Plague Shield[/gold]{optional_reward}.
ENDLESS_MODE.enter.multiplayer.descripti: Endless mode is not supported in multiplayer.
ENDLESS_MODE.enter.1.description: Return to Act 1. Gain [gold]Plague Spear[/gold], [gold]Plague Shield[/gold], and [gold]Mimic Infestation[/gold].
ENDLESS_MODE.enter.2.description: Return to Act 1. Gain [gold]Plague Spear[/gold], [gold]Plague Shield[/gold], and [gold]Time Maze[/gold].
ENDLESS_MODE.enter.3.description: Return to Act 1. Gain [gold]Plague Spear[/gold], [gold]Plague Shield[/gold], and [gold]Muzzle[/gold].
ENDLESS_MODE.enter.4.description: Return to Act 1. Gain [gold]Plague Spear[/gold], [gold]Plague Shield[/gold], and [gold]Horrible Trophy[/gold].
ENDLESS_MODE.config.title: Endless Mode Config
ENDLESS_MODE.config.note: Affects future endless loops only. In multiplayer, the host's config is used. Plague Spear and Plague Shield are always granted.
ENDLESS_MODE.config.tooltip: When disabled, future endless loops will not grant this relic at its matching reward tier.
